summary: Comprehensive testing of Football Match Analyzer 'MatchPulse' Phase 3 features. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features working. Backend refactoring to modules successful.
passed_tests: Backend health check /api/health returns ok
POST /api/auth/register creates user with equipped_player_id field
POST /api/auth/login returns valid JWT token
GET /api/matches returns 200+ real matches from API-Football
GET /api/matches sorted correctly: live > upcoming > finished
GET /api/matches?status=finished returns only finished matches
GET /api/matches/{id} returns match detail with events, stats, lineups
POST /api/bets bet_type=winner works correctly
POST /api/bets bet_type=exact_score works (5.0 odds)
POST /api/bets bet_type=both_teams_score works (1.9 odds)
POST /api/bets bet_type=over_under works (1.85 odds)
POST /api/equip/{player_id} requires owned player
GET /api/equipped returns equipped player info
POST /api/unequip fails when no player equipped
Equip flow: open pack -> equip player works
GET /api/boosts/{match_id} returns boost info for equipped player
GET /api/players returns all 80 players (10 legendary, 20 epic, 25 rare, 25 common)
GET /api/collection returns 80 players with owned status
POST /api/packs/open/bronze returns player from 80-player pool
GET /api/daily-challenge returns real match of the day
Frontend: Homepage loads with 209 matches
Frontend: Match detail page shows goal summary, card summary
Frontend: Match detail page shows lineups tab with formations
Frontend: Match detail page shows statistics tab
Frontend: BetSlip shows all 6 bet types with correct odds
Frontend: Collection page shows 0/80 players collected
Frontend: Collection page shows Owned/All filters
Frontend: Packs page shows Bronze/Silver/Gold with probabilities
Frontend: Daily Bonus modal with streak multipliers
seed_data_creation: None required - uses real API-Football data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored into modules: server.py (slim), config.py, models.py, routes/{auth,matches,bets,social,gacha}.py. 80 players in data/players.py with teams for boost calculation. 6 bet types: winner, exact_score, first_scorer, total_goals, both_teams_score, over_under. Equip system: POST /api/equip/{player_id}, POST /api/unequip (fails if pending bets today), GET /api/equipped. Daily challenge picks best match of day.

features_verified.module_refactoring: Server.py split into config.py, models.py, data/players.py, routes/auth.py, routes/matches.py, routes/bets.py, routes/social.py, routes/gacha.py - all working
features_verified.match_details: GoalSummary shows all scorers, CardSummary shows yellow/red cards, LineupsPanel shows formations and starting XI
features_verified.bet_types: 6 types working: winner (1.8), exact_score (5.0), first_scorer (4.5), total_goals (2.5), both_teams_score (1.9), over_under (1.85)
features_verified.equip_system: Equip one player for boost, cannot unequip if pending bets today
features_verified.daily_challenge: Returns real match of the day or fallback to next 3 days
